playbook.intent: Zero audience → 5K followers on X plus 1K newsletter subscribers in 26 weeks.
playbook.scope: Solo indie hacker compounds an owned distribution channel — Twitter/X plus a newsletter — from zero to a launch-ready 5K/1K base over six months by running a weekly build-in-public cadence with measurable feedback loops.

success-criteria.criterion: Newsletter list at ≥1000 subscribers with ≥35% open rate
Six monthly retrospectives with quantitative deltas

stage.name: Positioning
stage.intent: One-sentence persona-niche-promise that every post will reinforce.

tasks.task: Write a positioning sentence: 'I help <persona> do <job> via <method>'
Map the 3 core themes the account will own
Set up bio, pinned tweet, and newsletter homepage to match

stage.decision-gate: Advance when a stranger can describe what the account is about after one scroll.

stage.name: Cadence
stage.intent: A weekly content engine that survives travel and low energy.

tasks.task: Define daily tweet slots (build / lesson / signal / banter)
Schedule one weekly newsletter draft + send cadence
Set up a hook bank fed by replies and DMs

stage.decision-gate: Advance if cadence survives 2 consecutive weeks unaided.

stage.name: Newsletter Funnel
stage.intent: Twitter readers convert to newsletter subscribers at a measurable rate.

tasks.task: Build a 1-page newsletter landing with a real promise
Pin a tweet that pitches the newsletter
Send issue #1, then every Sunday after

stage.decision-gate: Advance if signup rate ≥3% of weekly profile visits.

stage.name: Community
stage.intent: From broadcast to conversation: replies and DMs do the compounding.

tasks.task: Set a daily 30-min reply window on 10 in-niche threads
Run a monthly 'ask me anything' to surface objections
Activate active-listening on every newsletter reply

stage.decision-gate: Advance if at least 5 inbound DMs/week are starting from your replies.

stage.name: Iteration
stage.intent: Monthly OKR review tightens the cadence and themes.

tasks.task: Reset OKRs for the next 30 days

stage.decision-gate: Advance if monthly deltas trend positive 3 months in a row. Re-position if growth flatlines for 2 consecutive months.

extra.value: ['Paid ads, influencer buys, or growth hacking', 'Multi-channel breadth (TikTok, YouTube) — owned-text only', 'Selling specific products — audience layer, not funnel layer']
[A handle on X that the founder controls full-time, Newsletter platform account (Substack or Beehiiv) ready]
[Treating the playbook as a checklist instead of a decision tree, Skipping decision gates when intermediate progress feels good, Letting tools or platforms replace the founder's own judgement]

['Did each stage produce its named output or get explicitly skipped with a note?', 'Were decision gates respected or quietly bypassed?', 'Is the evidence trail strong enough to defend the verdict externally?']

{human: faion get-content build-in-public-audience-0-to-5k --format md, agent: faion get-content build-in-public-audience-0-to-5k --format context, json: faion get-content build-in-public-audience-0-to-5k --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft from brainstorm-2026-05-17, persona P2 (indie hacker)'}]
